Provincial Tax Breakdown Mutation Entry Fee (Fixed Rs. 500) + Stamp Duty / Mutation Fee (1%) + DC Council / TMA Fee (1%). All payable by the Buyer.
Federal FBR Tax Rates Sec. 236-C (Seller): Filer 4.5%, Late Filer 7.5%, Non-Filer 11.5%.  |  Sec. 236-K (Buyer): Filer 1.5%, Late Filer 4.5%, Non-Filer 10.5%.
